content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.02%, VIX +3.4% to 17.19 — broad index weakness with rising volatility. However, individual names with Q4 catalysts (COFORGE, PIDILIT, BHARATFORG, POLYCAB) are surging hard — earnings-season is producing strong stock-specific moves divorced from index direction. Book is +1.36% intraday; priority is locking gains on winners (COFORGE +8.3%, PNBHOUSING +10.4%) and managing two losers (LUPIN -3.6%, BHARATFORG fading from highs).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.4% winner, CMP 1086.70, SL 1066.24 already at +8.4% (well above breakeven, 1.9% gap to CMP — within trail-gap discipline). Stored SL is fine as-is; bullish HFC re-rating thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, AAA pursuit). Holding HOLD-equivalent — no change needed; emitting MODIFY with same values is no-op so converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: stored SL 1066.24 already locks +8.4% gain with healthy 1.9% buffer to CMP 1086.70. Target 1135 still ~4.5% upside. No SL tightening warranted yet — wait for break above 1090 to trail higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF position, -0.6% only. With VIX rising 3.4% and equity indices weak, gold safe-haven thesis remains intact. SL 121 (-3.3%) appropriate, target 135 still valid."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (PAT +14%, revenue +22%), new ATH today, +0.9% gain modest but thesis confirmed. Tightening SL from 812 to 818 (still 1.2% below CMP 827.50, satisfying 1% trail-gap floor) to lock minor gain. Target 870 (+5%) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1338.68 already at +6.3% from entry 1259 (locks solid gain). CMP 1363, gap to SL is 1.8% — within trail-gap discipline. Q4 PAT +134% YoY, USD 1.75B order book, AI tailwind. Stock pulled back from intraday high 1366 to 1360 — keeping current SL/target; this is a no-op MODIFY → converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1338.68 locks +6.3% gain with 1.8% buffer to CMP 1363 — within trail-gap discipline. Target 1450 (+15%) still 6.4% upside. Strong Q4 catalyst, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3010.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defense play +1.4%, FY26 PAT +41.8%, order book strong. Tightening SL from 2960 to 3010 (-2.0% from CMP 3073.70, 2.1% below CMP — satisfies trail-gap). Target 3225 (+5%) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.74,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 832 already at entry+3.2% (locks gain). CMP 840.15 — gap is 1.0% to SL, exactly at trail-gap floor. Holding stored SL; no-op MODIFY → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.74,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 832 locks +3.2% gain, sitting 1.0% below CMP 840.15 — at trail-gap floor, do not tighten further (would force exit on noise). Q4 results clean, +5.4% today. Target 875 still ~4% upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% on entry day, but Q4 PAT +37% beat is strong, +8.6% intraday move. SL 1445 (-3.0%) appropriate buffer for post-results volatility. Target 1575 (+5.7%) intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -3.6%, CMP 2366.20, stored SL 2370 — CMP is now BELOW stored SL, meaning the SL trigger has effectively been touched. Per Rule 17, respect the SL — do NOT preemptively exit at a slightly worse price than the SL itself. The SL was placed at entry as the calibrated maximum loss. Q4 results were exceptional (PAT +87.5%, dividend Rs 18, USFDA approvals) — selling on intraday post-result fade with thesis intact would be premature. SL will execute at broker side; allowing it to do so. If chart bounces from 2365 support, position recovers."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, Q4 PAT +317% YoY, technical breakout above 1570 with 11.8x volume. Stored SL 1580 (-2.3% from entry 1618) is appropriate. CMP 1610.90 with gap to SL 1.9% — fine. No-op MODIFY → keeping stored values, treating as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1580 appropriate post-Q4 (-2.3% from entry, 1.9% below CMP). Massive volume surge confirms institutional interest. Target 1740 (+8%) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%. Q4 PAT +11%, FY26 PAT +47%, fluorochemicals momentum strong. SL 2740 (-1.6%) tight, target 2920 (+4.8%) reasonable. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, near 52-week high zone after Q4 record revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47/share. SL 9000 (-1.1%) tight given volatility, target 9550 (+5%). Letting it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, Q4 mixed (revenue +17.5% but PAT -17.4% on exceptionals), defense order book Rs 10,961 Cr is strong. Stock fading from intraday 52w high 2044 to 2001.90. SL 1955 (-3%) gives room. NA Class 8 truck collapse is real FY27 headwind but defense offset. Holding to SL — Rule 17 discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 364.50,
      "stop_loss": 354.00,
      "target": 384.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26 record results: PAT +41% YoY, lending +32%, asset quality improving, ROA +63bps. Morgan Stanley Overweight TP 320 (already exceeded). Stock at fresh ATH 372 area, holding 364 support. Position size: 130×364.50 = ₹47,385 (~4.7% of capital). SL 354 = -2.9%, target 384 = +5.4%. Risk:reward = 10.5/19.5 = 1.86, above 1.5 floor. Risk budget: 4.7% × 2.9% = 0.14% of portfolio, well within 0.5%. Adding selective BFSI exposure with strong Q4 catalyst confirmed; complementing CAMS in financial-services cluster (combined ~7% of capital, well under 35% cap)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "OPEN MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 3355m ago — this is a stale order from a prior session that should have been cancelled. CANCELLING this stale pending order — MIS orders cannot carry across sessions and the original setup is no longer valid."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +8.4%, 1.9% buffer to CMP — no tighter trail without violating gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, VIX rising. Hold SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening from 812 to 818 to lock gain (+₹140 above entry from prior breakeven SL). Gap to CMP 827.50 = 1.15%, satisfies trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +6.3%, gap 1.8% to CMP 1363. Strong Q4 momentum, let it run to target 1450."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 3010.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 2960 to 3010 to lock breakeven+. Gap 2.1% to CMP 3073.70, within discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor (1% below CMP 840.15). Tightening further would force noise-exit. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7% on entry day, Q4 strong, intraday +8.6% move. SL gives room for post-results chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2370.00,
      "reasoning": "CMP 2366.20 below stored SL 2370 — SL trigger essentially active on broker side. Let it execute (Rule 17). Q4 phenomenal but post-result fade in progress; not preemptively exiting at marginally worse price."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst (PAT +317%) intact, breakout structure on volume. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2740.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat, Q4 strong. No adjustment."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9000.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.3% near ATH, Q4 record results. SL tight enough."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Mixed Q4 (defense strong, NA truck weak). Letting SL absorb chop, not preempting."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "WOCKPHARMA add candidate is rejected — already holding and don't want to concentrate pharma further. SRF and PIDILITIND already held. THERMAX, BAJAJ-AUTO, DABUR, ASIANPAINT, PERSISTENT, RAMCOCEM, LAURUSLABS, NH, KPIL, APOLLOTYRE, FINCABLES, TATATECH all up sharply on Q4 catalysts but most are extended after 5-10% intraday moves; chasing breakouts at 12:42 PM into a -0.6% Nifty session is poor risk-reward. INDUSINDBK rejected per Rule 13 governance overhang (SFIO probe still unresolved). GABRIEL extended. ABCAPITAL chosen as the one fresh admit because it pulled back from ATH to support and offers cleanest entry zone. Will reassess THERMAX/PERSISTENT on tomorrow's open if pullback materializes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily positioned (~58% deployed) with 12 CNC names — most are post-Q4 winners (COFORGE +8.3%, PNBHOUSING +10.4%, MARICO +0.9%) or post-Q4 entries today. Total intraday P&L +1.36% is healthy. Adding ABCAPITAL takes deployment to ~63%, still well within soft 80% cap. Sector mix: Pharma (LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA ~9%), Capital Goods (POLYCAB+GRSE ~9%), Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+CAMS+ABCAPITAL ~17%), Chemicals (PIDILIT+SRF ~9%), FMCG (MARICO ~5%), IT (COFORGE ~4%), Auto (BHARATFORG ~5%), ETF (GOLDBEES ~5%) — all clusters under 20% threshold per Rule 10. Cancelling stale HFCL MIS order from prior session. Key risk: LUPIN SL likely to fire today; have accepted that. VIX rising signals broader caution — not adding multiple new names."
}
